description: Create a fully-constrained 2D sketch of a D-shaped carabiner frame's outer boundary in SolveSpace. The sketch must be a closed loop consisting of a vertical spine on the Y-axis with endpoints at (0, 30) and (0, -25), a Top Corner Arc (radius 15 mm) tangent to the spine at (0, 30) curving into the first quadrant, and a Bottom Corner Arc (radius 10 mm) tangent to the spine at (0, -25) curving into the fourth quadrant. Connect the corner arcs with a Basket Arc (radius 70 mm) tangent to both, ensuring the shape is a convex D-shape bulging to the right. Save the completed sketch with 0 degrees of freedom to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/carabiner_profile.slvs.
